name: libtext-reform-perl
title: libtext-reform-perl
summary: Perl module for manual text wrapping and reformatting
description:
Perl module for manual text wrapping and reformatting
Text::Reform provides a re-entrant, highly configurable replacement
for the built-in Perl format() mechanism.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtext-reform-perl because Perl module for manual text wrapping and reformatting.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtext-reform-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtext-reform-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtext-reform-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
